steps.title: Find the exponential pattern
steps.content: Use the form $g(x)=ab^x$. The table shows $g(0)=1$, so $$a=1.$$ The table also shows $g(1)=\frac{1}{25}$, so $$ab=\frac{1}{25}.$$ Since $a=1$, $$b=\frac{1}{25}.$$

steps.title: Read the base
steps.content: Therefore $g(x)=\left(\frac{1}{25}\right)^x$. The positive value at $x=0$ also eliminates the choices with a leading negative sign.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is $g(x)=\left(\frac{1}{25}\right)^x$, so D is correct.
